(ii) 3crRR^g, (Hi) FfcnuTT, (iv) 3t^fR3ftrPid5ldK fiM^Jjg, (V) 3TO SltST, (Vi) (Vii) (Viil) qfWT^TTT^, (JX) bcril^JI^, (x) r^m:\ [m tf. 6-1/2006-^iw-n MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th May, 2007 S.O. 802(E).— in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (l) of section 5A of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972) read with sub - rule (4) of rule 3 of the National Board for Wild Lite Rules. 2003, the Central Government hereby nominates the following as the members to the National Board for Wild Life and for that purpose makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 1003 (E) dated, 22nd September 2003, namely:- (i) In the said notification, in clause (c), for the existing serial numbers and entries, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- -- 2 of 5 -- >TT7Tii-'j^3(ii)] wsi ^>r T&m : ammw • (i) Shri Rajen Gohain, Lok Sabha, (iij Prof. Chander Kumar, Lok Sabha, (iii) Shri Dwijendra Nath Sharma, Rajya Sabha."; in clause (ej, for the existing serial numbers and entries, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- "(i) Wildlife Protection Society of India, Delhi, (iij Reef Watch, Mumbai, riii) Wildlife First, Bangalore, (iv) World Wide Fund for Nature-India, Delhi, (v) Bombay Natural History Society, Mumbai."; ti**|f?in clause (0. for the existing serial numbers and entries, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- *'(i) Shri Divyabhanu Sinh Chavda, • (i;)' Shri Yalmik Thapar. No. 6-1/2006 WL-I(pt) GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT & FORESTS NATIONAL BOARD FOR WILDLIFE Page 1 of 4 PARYAVARAN BHAWAN, CGO COMPLEX, LODI ROAD, NEWDELHI-110003 DATED: °l JULY 2007. NOTIFICATION In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 5B of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), read with rule 11 of the National Board for Wild Life Rules, 2003, the National Board for Wild Life hereby constitutes the Standing Committee of the National Board for Wild Life consisting of the following members, namely:- Chairman : Members : Minister for Environment & Forests Prof. Chander Kumar, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Secretary to the Government of India in charge of the Ministry of Environment & Forests The Director General of Forests in the Ministry of Environment & Forests The Director, Wildlife Institute of India, Dehradun. Dr. Asad Rehmani, Director, Bombay Natural History Society, Mumbai. Dr. Divyabhanu Sinh Chavda, Jaipur Dr.B. K. Talukdar, Guwahati A representative each of the following States: Orissa Uttarakhand Member-Secretary The Director, Wildlife Preservation. -- 4 of 5 -- /QGovernment of India Ministry of Environment & Forests ("Wildlife Division) Paryavaran Bhawan, CGO Complex, Lodi Road. New Delhi-110003 F, .\o. 6-1/2006 WL-I (pt) Dated; 19th March 200S Office M e m o r a n d u m * * * * * * * * * * • * * • * • * # * In continuation to the notification of the Ministry of Environment & Forests of even no. dated 9th July 2007 re-constituting the Standing Committee of National Board for Wildlife, the following name has also been included as a member of the Standing Committee of National Board for Wildlife: lo •• Dr. M X Ranjitsinh". This has the approval of the competent authority. ( Dr. Anmol KuffiafT Deputy Inspector General (WL) Telefax: 011-24362813. Distribution: 1. DGF(WL) 7. PStoIGF(WL) 8. PS to Member-Secretary, NCTA, Bikaner House, New Delhi 9. PPS to IGF& Director (PE) 10. All members, National Board for Wildlife. -- 5 of 5 --
